commit_message: Fix ReusableStringStream to access the container under the lock (#3031)
clang: do not issue bogus warnings about integer manipulation in hash functions with fsanitize=undefined/integer (#2965)
Explicitly cast values of different types
Use steady_clock in the timer
Avoid useless FDuration cast in benchmark analysis (#2823)

diff:
diff --git a/src/catch2/catch_approx.cpp b/src/catch2/catch_approx.cpp
index 9ad4ce3e..08c6799b 100644
--- a/src/catch2/catch_approx.cpp
+++ b/src/catch2/catch_approx.cpp
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ bool marginComparison(double lhs, double rhs, double margin) {
 namespace Catch {
 
     Approx::Approx ( double value )
-    :   m_epsilon( std::numeric_limits<float>::epsilon()*100. ),
+    :   m_epsilon( static_cast<double>(std::numeric_limits<float>::epsilon())*100. ),
         m_margin( 0.0 ),
         m_scale( 0.0 ),
         m_value( value )
commit_message: fix double promotion in catch_approx.cpp
Ensure we always read 32 bit seed from std::random_device
Fix UDL definitions for C++23
Don't define tryTranslators function if exception are disabled
Clean up explanation in tests
2 more TEST_CASEs to DiscoverTests/register-tests.cpp
Directly construct empty string for invalid SectionInfo
Move sectionInfo into sectionEndInfo when SECTION ends
fix compiler warning in parseUint and catch only relevant exceptions (#2572)
Add test for comparing pointers to NULL with !=
Add check for registering multiple reporters under same name
Fix uninit memory in Clara tests

-// X10-FallbackStringifier.cpp
-// Test that defining fallbackStringifier compiles
+/**\file
+ * Test that the user can define custom fallbackStringifier 
+ *
+ * This is done by defining a custom fallback stringifier that prints
+ * out a specific string, and then asserting (to cause stringification)
+ * over a type without stringification support.
+ */

commit_message: Use the new licence header in SelfTest's cpp files
Extra compilation checks for compiling without exceptions
Add more macros to the DisabledMacros test
Add tests for Optional's op== and !=
Let users of amalgamated distribution override the default main

diff:
diff --git a/src/catch2/catch_approx.cpp b/src/catch2/catch_approx.cpp
index 3dfebf46..50cb75c3 100644
--- a/src/catch2/catch_approx.cpp
+++ b/src/catch2/catch_approx.cpp
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ bool marginComparison(double lhs, double rhs, double margin) {
 namespace Catch {
 
     Approx::Approx ( double value )
-    :   m_epsilon( std::numeric_limits<float>::epsilon()*100 ),
+    :   m_epsilon( std::numeric_limits<float>::epsilon()*100. ),
         m_margin( 0.0 ),
         m_scale( 0.0 ),
         m_value( value )
commit_message: Avoid static analysis warning in Approx
Force __cdecl calling convention for wmain
Only start Section's timer if the duration will be used
Replace a TODO comment in examples
Microopt: stream single char instead of single char string
Fix warnings in ExtraTests and Examples
Suppress global constructor warning in benchmarking
Convert examples to piecemeal includes
Do not blindly access empty StringRefs
Check for empty expression properly

commit_message: Small updates to include directives (#1726)
Use StringRef literal for unknown enum values instead of string lit
Use __android_log_write instead of __android_log_print
Add Android implementation of writeToDebugConsole that prints to Logcat (#1710)
Add failing test for CATCH_UNSCOPED_CAPTURE
Fix warnings generated with -Wshadow
Avoid adding a default test spec when none was provided
use "std" namespace for "sprintf"
Remove unused type from tests
Don't use exception-related std:: functions with -fno-exceptions
Moved inline functions in cpp files into anon namespaces
Add an early bailout out of benchmark timer calibration
Guard against CLR exceptions when translating exceptions
Removed debug code accidentally left in previous commit
Fix std::uncaught_exception deprecation warning in ~ScopedMessage
Move crtdbg.h include outside namespace
Remove pointless StringRef -> std::string conversions
Fixed issues for ObjC use (see #1011)
Explicit ctor used to fix compilation failures caused by copy initialization.
Hold translated exception in local string while matching
Fix SelfTest compilation after _THROWS_ assertion change
Added some missing cstring includes

diff:
diff --git a/projects/SelfTest/CompilationTests.cpp b/projects/SelfTest/CompilationTests.cpp
index 06d361fb..3298c79e 100644
--- a/projects/SelfTest/CompilationTests.cpp
+++ b/projects/SelfTest/CompilationTests.cpp
@@ -55,6 +55,11 @@ TEST_CASE("#833") {
 #pragma clang diagnostic push
 #pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wunused-function"
 #endif
+#ifdef __GNUC__
+// Note that because -~GCC~-, this warning cannot be silenced temporarily, by pushing diagnostic stack...
+// Luckily it is firing in test files and thus can be silenced for the whole file, without losing much.
+#pragma GCC diagnostic ignored "-Wunused-function"
+#endif
 
 // Test containing example where original stream insertable check breaks compilation
 namespace {

Fix double-to-float conversion warning in tests

commit_message: Added copyright headers to benchmark files.
ToStringTuple - gcc doesn't like tuple init_list ctor
Added vector resizing example to BDD tests
Added test for previous change
Added tests for true == true etc
Updated test count check to include recently added tests
Updated self test with current test counts
Updated test counts following addition of more test cases
Fixes to the self test
Allow -s to be used to show successful results in test harness
Test cases all succeed again
